rows.owner_type_screen: entity/corporate/trust - exclude from default human-only seller contact lane unless explicitly requested
rows.busy_street_screen: low/medium - not an obvious named arterial from address string; verify on map/street view
rows.zoning_overlay_raw: no Raleigh zoning overlay hit / unknown
rows.proof_gate_status: candidate - no automated hard-screen hit; manual slope/stream/utilities still required
rows.manual_review_needed: slope/topography; stream buffer/watercourse; lot shape/frontage/setbacks; utility service/taps; active/sold listing context; buyer yes/no confirmation
rows.provenance: Wake County Parcels + Wake Easements + Wake Transportation + FEMA NFHL first-pass overlay. Zillow/Redfin links are outbound context only.
rows.link_note: Wake iMAPS blocks direct deep links; open Wake Maps and search the PIN/REID shown. Zillow/Redfin direct pages often block automated deep links, so packet uses Google site-search lookups that open reliably.
